title: Narrate a problem with stages
subtitle: Describe problem, reaction, result.
overview: A B1 problem story has stages.
Use first, then, finally, and result.

sections.title: Pattern
rows: Luego me di cuenta de que...

items.es: Al principio pensé que era un error pequeño.
items.en: At first I thought it was a small mistake.

items.es: Luego me di cuenta de que mi reserva no aparecía.
items.en: Then I realized that my reservation did not appear.

items.es: Intenté resolverlo hablando con la recepción.
items.en: I tried to solve it by speaking with reception.

items.es: Al final encontraron mi nombre en otro sistema.
items.en: In the end they found my name in another system.

items.es: Fue estresante, pero aprendí a explicar el problema con calma.
items.en: It was stressful, but I learned to explain the problem calmly.
